name: command
title: BTCommand
description: Command palette / search menu (web only). Compound component: BTCommand · BTCommandInput · BTCommandList · BTCommandEmpty · BTCommandGroup · BTCommandItem · BTCommandSeparator · BTCommandShortcut · BTCommandDialog.

files.content:
export {
  BTCommand,
  BTCommandInput,
  BTCommandList,
  BTCommandEmpty,
  BTCommandGroup,
  BTCommandItem,
  BTCommandSeparator,
  BTCommandShortcut,
  BTCommandDialog,
} from './BTCommand';
export type {
  BTCommandProps,
  BTCommandInputProps,
  BTCommandListProps,
  BTCommandEmptyProps,
  BTCommandGroupProps,
  BTCommandItemProps,
  BTCommandShortcutProps,
  BTCommandDialogProps,
} from './BTCommand';
